mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_operation_log (order_id, order_no, operator_id, operator_name, operator_role, operation, old_status, new_status, remark, extra_info) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{orderNo}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{operatorRole}, #{operation}, #{oldStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{remark}, #{extraInfo})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, order_no, operator_id, operator_name, operator_role, operation, old_status, new_status, remark, extra_info, created_at FROM order_operation_log WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
